title: tds_packetsize
text: tds_packetsize Set the Sybase packet size. USYS$SYS_PARAMS tds_packetsize Value Arguments Value — integer that is a multiple of 512 Description This option can change the performance of the connector in either a positive or a negative way. When using this option, you need to ensure that the Sybase SQL server can handle the packet size. For more information, see Set the Sybase Packet Size . If this connector option is not specified, the default Sybase server packet size is used. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
